reviews.review_description: READ BEFORE getting . And if wrong and there’s a way too will change stars and keep🤞🏼🥲😑😤So fun til seen don’t save at all and u hav to start over so pretty much I just bought two levels !!! Plz tell me devs this will change asap caus why????having issues moving the cubes directly next to the start and finish cubes mor often then others🤔About the fifth time I click it it finally does, might be caus playing board is a tad closer idk and checked my remote batteries also and they r new so hopeing its not those since they r new. But had to point this out befor others might hav issues as well and it can b a quik fix caus game is great and fun.  I wil add that star and highly recommend to all puzzle game lovers like myself if any feedbk comes my way also! Lastly a setting for music would b great caus honestly distracting and being profoundly deaf along w my anxiety issue from the timer I probably won’t get past level 3 😬😆But great job guys and puzzlers  don’t wanna miss out🥰  And if needing any referrals for other games plz check out link in my profile for discounts!! Updated and check daily for friend requests!! Hav a blessed one y’all🥰 EDIT can’t believe no saves y’all!!! U will play the forst 3 levels 40 times so one mor star off sorry but doesn’t seem fare or fun to play something all the over again. Refund if can’t b changed I’ll basically hav two levels in the game 😤😒😩

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for taking the time to leave a review.
We are truly glad to hear that you enjoyed the game—your feedback is a great encouragement to our development team.

We sincerely appreciate your comment regarding the lack of a save function.
Please rest assured that we are currently reviewing this feature for future updates to enhance the overall gameplay experience.

Regarding the issue where the cubes near the start and goal positions are difficult to move—
may we confirm if this refers to cubes not responding properly when moved toward empty tiles?
If so, the issue may be related to the camera or controller being positioned too closely, which can affect responsiveness.

We kindly suggest trying the following:

Step back slightly from the screen during gameplay

Press and hold the Meta button to reset the screen’s center position

This may help improve control responsiveness.

We also appreciate your thoughts about the background music and the timer, and will take your suggestions into account for potential updates.

We hope you continue to enjoy the game and challenge yourself to achieve a high score!
Thank you once again for your valuable feedback.
